LanguageData.UB_SNS_DogVictim.title: Bite suit worker
LanguageData.UB_SNS_DogVictim.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked at a local police station to work in the K9 unit as a handler. Unfortunately [PAWN_pronoun] didn't read the job description close enough, and was hired as a bite suit worker. Forced to wear a cheap bite suit and be assaulted by K9 training dogs, [PAWN_nameDef] would commonly end up in the hospital with bite wounds and scratches, but was paraded as a local hero for their hardiness.
